ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the economic data entry */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded data */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the economic indicator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the country */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "data_status" TEXT /* Status of the data (preliminary, final) */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the data */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Current inflation rate */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Current unemployment rate */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the data */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator (e.g., GDP, Inflation Rate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the indicator measures */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., USD, %) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Typical frequency of data collection */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the data */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., World Bank, IMF) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for accessing the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the data */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update log entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic data entry that was updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was updated */,
  "update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "old_value" REAL /* Previous value of the data */,
  "new_value" REAL /* New value of the data */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the data */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the data */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the data */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who exported the data */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exported */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "data_range" TEXT /* Range of data being exported */,
  "export_size" REAL /* Size of the exported data */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the data */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the data */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
